company.name: GeethaFoods Co.
company.description: Premium quality fresh and frozen produce for businesses and households. Browse our catalog and order directly via WhatsApp.
company.about: Geetha Foods is a leading food-service distribution company supplying premium products to restaurants, cafés, hotels, bakeries, and cloud kitchens. We partner with trusted brands such as ITC, Amul, Veeba, Del Monte, McCain, Milky Mist, Yummiez, Mala's, Fun Foods, and many more. With a diverse portfolio spanning frozen foods, dairy, beverages, sauces, and kitchen essentials, we provide a one-stop procurement solution for the hospitality industry. Our strong distribution network ensures consistent quality, timely deliveries, and reliable service. We are committed to helping food businesses streamline operations and enhance customer experiences. At Geetha Foods, we don't just supply products—we build lasting partnerships that drive growth.
